events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: Loop checks & wiring, observed field condition: missing surge protection on field side. Work through testing/inspection. Compare against loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Missing surge protection on field side likely non-compliant if drawings/spec require surge protection. It is a defect, but is it fail? The prompt: If work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Missing surge protection could be non-compliance with design/spec; also risk to instrumentation from transients, maybe medium/high. Need include component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. Work_stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 90? value not asked, 0. confidence high. findings: missing surge protection on field side per loop drawings/spec. actions: install specified surge protective device, verify loop check, retest. rationale. references: loop drawings, ISA 5.1, maybe NEC/UL? But only given references. Use ISA 5.1 for instrumentation symbols and loop documentation; surge protection may be shown on loop drawing. Could mention project loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.
